landing.heroTitle: Grow smarter. Earn more. Worry less.
landing.heroSubtitle: FarmHelper diagnoses crop problems, plans the most profitable crops for your land, builds a smart farm calendar, and connects you directly to buyers — all from your phone.

diagnose.title: Diagnose
diagnose.body: Snap a photo of a sick leaf and get an AI diagnosis with treatment steps in your language.

plan.title: Plan profit
plan.body: Tell us your land and season — AI ranks the most profitable crops for your region.

calendar.title: Smart calendar
calendar.body: Auto-generated sowing, watering, fertilizing and harvest tasks. Never miss a step.

sell.title: Sell direct
sell.body: List your harvest and reach buyers directly. Skip the middleman, keep the margin.

how.step1Body: Tell us your country and the crops you grow.
how.step2Body: Get diagnosis, profit plans, and a personalized calendar.
how.step3Body: Follow the plan and list your harvest in the marketplace.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your FarmHelper account.
auth.signupSubtitle: Start growing smarter in two minutes.

errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Your farm at a glance.
dashboard.noBadges: Earn badges by adding plots, diagnosing crops, and selling produce.
dashboard.noUpcoming: No upcoming tasks. Add some from the Calendar.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Update your region, units and preferences.
settings.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Platform overview and moderation queue.
